examples: They have removed all tactical nuclear missiles that could strike Europe.
I think he made a tactical blunder by announcing it so far ahead of time.
The faint arrows, similar to the directional markings on a tactical map, are one of the rare carry-overs from his military world.
New tactical trading plays will evolve quickly, while longer term strategies will evolve more slowly.
And I think it is McCain, once again, showing how tactical he can be.
